projectDescription: A Vue 3 Apache ECharts component for uni-app that enables seamless chart rendering across Web, Mini Programs, and APP platforms.
keyFeatures: Drop-in Apache ECharts component for uni-app with Vue 3 Composition API support
Cross-platform compatibility: Web, WeChat/Alipay Mini Programs, and APP
Vite plugin for automatic echarts injection and optimizeDeps configuration
Dependency injection (provide/inject) API for global theme and option configuration
TypeScript support with full type definitions
easycom support for zero-config component auto-import
CLI tool (@uni-echarts/c2e) for converting custom ECharts builds to ESM format
Component exposes ECharts instance methods via template refs
publicApiSurface: provideEchartsOption(value) / provideEchartsOption(key, value) — inject chart option globally
provideEchartsInitOptions(value) — inject echarts init options globally
UniEchartsResolver() — component/API auto-import resolver for unplugin
ECHARTS_KEY, THEME_KEY — provide/inject keys for Options API
UniEchartsInst — TypeScript type for component instance ref
